Test Case/Summary: Learn more link opens a valid web address
Description: Verify that the 'Learn more' link points to a real web address — the href must be present, non-empty, and must begin with either http:// or https:// so that clicking it opens a proper webpage.
Data: Expected: href is a full web address beginning with 'http://' or 'https://' (for example https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved)
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to TEST_URL; 2. Locate the 'Learn more' link using its link text; 3. Read the href attribute value; 4. Confirm the value is not empty; 5. Confirm the value starts with 'http://' or 'https://'
Expected outcome: The 'Learn more' link has a non-empty href that starts with 'http://' or 'https://', meaning it points to a real, clickable web page (BR-004)
